prompt: Edit image 1: Add the colorful circular collage elements from image 2 to the branches of the tree, creating a blooming tree composition. Maintain the collage texture and style from both images.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1: Add the colorful, circular, collage-style 'flower' elements from image 2 to the bare branches of the tree in image 1. Distribute these elements to create a blooming tree composition, maintaining the distinct paper collage texture and artistic style seen in both image 1 and image 2.
objects: Colorful circular collage flowers distributed on branches
